case_title: IN RE: CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP

PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP'S (AMENDED) HEARING ON PETITION TO APPOINT NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR FROM JAMS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE CURTIS KARNOW; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

NTC OF MOTION TO CONFIORM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE KNOWS KATHLEEN FISHER FROM THE CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP, WHEN SHE WAS A PARTNER AT MORRISON & FOERSTER FROM 1997 THROUGH 2005. PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP'S MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. MR. HEBERT TO PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT WITH THE INTEREST CALCULATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Ntc Of Motion To Confiorm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM HEBERT OF CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP, TEL. NO. 374-8370 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Judge Miller disclosed that she knows Kathleen Fisher from the Calvo Fisher & Jacob LLP, when she was a partner at Morrison & Foerster from 1997 through 2005. PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. MR. HEBERT TO PREPARE A FORM OF JUDGMENT WITH THE INTEREST CALCULATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

(Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Appoint Neutral Arbitrator From James; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEVIN O. MOON OF CALVO, FISHER & JACOB LLP, TEL. NO. 374-8370 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP'S (Amended) Hearing On Petition To Appoint Neutral Arbitrator FROM JAMS is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Curtis Karnow; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
